reasoning: The visualization fails to directly answer the specific business question, which asks for the total revenue ('Wieviel Umsatz...') per year from 2021 to 2024. Instead of showing aggregated annual totals, it displays monthly data points overlaid on top of each other using a line chart with months as the x-axis. This makes it impossible to immediately read the yearly totals without performing manual calculations. Furthermore, plotting four years of monthly data against a single set of month labels (Jan-Dec) creates significant visual clutter and ambiguity, as lines intersect frequently, making trend analysis difficult. While the annotations highlight interesting peaks, they do not provide the summary metrics required by the prompt.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a bar chart where the X-axis represents the Years (2021-2024) and the Y-axis shows the sum of monthly revenues for each respective year. This would directly visualize the total earnings per year.
